settings.title: Learning SPACE X Cosy Direct
settings.text: With an amazing range of sustainable, eco friendly and locally made indoor and outdoor products, Cosy Direct were the perfect company for Learning SPACE to collaborate with. From Early Years settings to parents at home, this range has something for everybody.

settings.bullet_point: Locally sourced and sustainable where possible
Approved by the EA, ETBs, HSC

settings.title: Your One Stop Shop for all things Education and Sensory
settings.text:
Our passion has been and always will be catering to the needs to children and adults with Additional Needs.

Working with schools, libraries, nurseries, hotels and so many more places to make the world a more accessible place

settings.content:
Brilliant service couldn’t have been any easier. Customer service is a 5 star plus Sinead put everything through for me and even called me back when our line disconnected.

Friendly lovely person you can tell she loves her job. I would definitely buy from this website again.

The training was fantastic. Andy was really amazing; I could listen to him all day-he has such knowledge and great advice. We would love to have him out again when the children are back in school. We have a few children who we think would benefit from meeting Andy

Fast, quick, simple, I felt heard by the team and respected during all my phone calls. I had a bit of a moment and ordered items that I didn’t need so panicked rang them and boom just like that all changed within a matter of seconds there was no issues worries nothing it was resolved very quickly the call handlers were amazing and cheerful which is always nice to hear. I highly recommend them. Granted some of the items are at a big price tag however they are great quality I ordered my son the red cone (Gonge top sit and spin) and he loves it. (5 Years old) The delivery was also incredibly fast considering it is Christmas season my items were received within a week of ordering (this may not always be the case however it does give an in sight)
Just wanted to say that the staff thought the training was outstanding yesterday!! Thanks to you and Andy who delivered it
Friendly and helpful customer service. Called up because the website was a little tricky on my phone and Tracy was really easy to talk to. Thank you

We had Andy into our charity to teach us his experience and knowledge about ASD ADHD and autism and much more. It was very insightful and a really great learning day. Andy was very friendly and helped answer and questions we had around this topic. It was very engaging and he brought some products that we could trial and use for future young people in our charity.

I had a slight amount left over from a family fund grant and a lovely customer service representative got in touch and asked if I’d like them to pick out some items. I agreed and they added a range of different toys that my little one will absolutely love. Not a lot of places would go out of their way like this so it’s much appreciated!!

Had training from Andy re Autism. Really informative and useful and delivered with conviction. Andy was very honest about his own experiences which he was able to share and bring a true perspective on the condition. Such an insight into the struggles faced by those living with ASD. Really excellent!

Tracey was amazing helping me today when I called after having a few issues online. She helped me with my order and adjusted a few things to help put my order through. Fantastic customer service and Tracey is a credit to your company. Can't wait to receive my order for my twins and will definitely be returning as a customer again. Such a fantastic range that would benefit my autistic boys. Thank you so much.

What an experience I had with Clonmore Youth Club when we had Andy in on Tuesday. I can't put into enough words how much knowledge we all gained from this course. Andy explains everything perfect and easily understood with also putting yourself in the views of people with Autism and other sensory issues. I came away with even ideas for my own home which was part of the reason I wanted to be there aswell as for the youth club and future work.
Andy is a must for any organisation as this is a topic that we all can be helped with in everyday life. Andy you are amazing keep up the AMAZING WORK 👏
